column1: Since it's raining, I won't go out.
column2: 雨なので、出かけません。
column3: あめなので、でかけません。
column4: 雨なので、出かけません。
column5: ので: objective reason — polite/objective reason connecting two clauses

column1: Since I have an exam tomorrow, I'll study.
